meta.sourcePolicy: Official HPA/JPA sources only. This file records 2016 event-level source candidates and must not auto-promote athlete histories into data/database.json.
notes: Temporary 2016 official-source candidate addendum for HPA Event Watch.
Keep separate from athlete master data, confirmed athlete histories, and research candidates.
The linked annual HPA result PDF is an event-level source locator; individual athlete rows require separate identity and row verification before promotion.
2016 source pages are historical official result PDFs; program, outline, entry roster, schedule, live速報, and YouTube links were not promoted unless separately confirmed.

sources.evidenceLines: PDF pages for 国民体育大会パワーリフティング競技 第2回北海道予選会 and 第20回北海道クラシックベンチプレス選手権大会 state 2016年5月15日 and 会場 江別市民体育館.

promotionGuardrails: Use this entry only as an official event source locator.
Do not create athlete histories from this file without row-level verification.
National-sport selection labels and classic bench labels must remain distinct in future importers.
Bench-only results are not interchangeable with three-lift histories unless the consuming feature explicitly handles event type.

promotionGuardrails: Use this entry only as an official event source locator.
Do not promote athlete rows into confirmed histories without matching athlete identity, category/class, event date, and PDF row.
Keep equipped, classic, junior, student/high-school, and bench-only divisions distinct when a future importer reads this source.
Do not infer athlete progression comments from this addendum alone.
